sentences.target: Prends le diable, s'il te plaît.

translations.fr: Prends le diable, s'il te plaît.
translations.pt: Pega o carrinho de carga, por favor.
translations.vi: Lấy xe đẩy hàng, làm ơn.
translations.ja: 手押し台車を持ってきてください。

tokens.explanation: Verb, imperative 2nd person singular; main predicate giving an order; selects a direct object (le diable).
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun diable and marks definiteness.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object NP; lexically ambiguous between ‘devil’ and ‘dolly/hand truck’.
Subordinating conjunction ‘si’ contracted orthographically with ‘il’ (3rd person pronoun); starts the polite clause in the fixed formula s'il te plaît (‘if it pleases you’).
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, indirect object (dative); experiencer argument of plaît.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the subordinate clause; subject is the elided ‘il’ from s'il.

sentences.target: Je pousse le diable jusqu'à la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pus lə djabl ʒyska la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je pousse le diable jusqu'à la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pus lə djabl ʒyska la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I'm pushing the dolly to the door.
translations.es: Empujo el diablito hasta la puerta.
translations.de: Ich schiebe die Sackkarre zur Tür.
translations.it: Spingo il carrello fino alla porta.
translations.pt: Empurro o carrinho de carga até a porta.
translations.he: אני דוחף את עגלת המשא אל הדלת.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đẩy xe đẩy hàng tới cửa.
translations.ar: أنا أدفع عربة اليد إلى الباب.
translations.nl: Ik duw de steekwagen naar de deur.
translations.hi: मैं हैंड ट्रॉली दरवाजे तक धकेल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σπρώχνω το καρότσι προς την πόρτα.
translations.nb: Jeg triller sekketralleen bort til døra.
translations.id: Saya mendorong troli barang ke pintu.
translations.da: Jeg skubber sækkevognen hen til døren.
translations.ja: 手押し台車をドアまで押しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of pousse.
Verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive predicate selecting direct object le diable.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of diable.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of pousse; lexically ambiguous (could be ‘devil’ or ‘dolly/hand truck’).
Complex preposition (‘jusque’ + ‘à’ contracted); introduces a goal endpoint complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of porte.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition jusqu'à.

sentences.target: On a acheté un diable hier.

translations.fr: On a acheté un diable hier.
translations.de: Wir haben gestern eine Sackkarre gekauft.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们昨天买了一辆手推车。
translations.yue: 我哋尋日買咗一架手推車。
translations.pt: Nós compramos um carrinho de carga ontem.
translations.vi: Hôm qua chúng tôi mua một cái xe đẩy hàng.
translations.nl: We hebben gisteren een steekwagen gekocht.
translations.hi: हमने कल एक हैंड ट्रॉली खरीदी.
translations.nb: Vi kjøpte en sekketralle i går.
translations.sv: Vi köpte en säckkärra i går.
translations.da: Vi købte en sækkevogn i går.
translations.ja: 昨日手押し台車を買いました。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective personal pronoun; syntactic subject; morphologically 3rd person singular.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect (passé composé) with the past participle acheté.
Past participle; main lexical verb in the periphrastic perfect; selects the direct object un diable.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a new referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of a acheté; in this purchasing context, typically the tool ‘dolly/hand truck’ (lexically also ‘devil’).
Temporal adverb; modifies the whole clause to indicate time.

sentences.target: Tu ranges le diable après la livraison.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ lə djabl apʁɛ la livʁɛzɔ̃/

translations.fr: Tu ranges le diable après la livraison.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ lə djabl apʁɛ la livʁɛzɔ̃/
translations.en: You put away the dolly after the delivery.
translations.es: Guardas el diablito después de la entrega.
translations.de: Du stellst die Sackkarre nach der Lieferung weg.
translations.it: Metti via il carrello dopo la consegna.
translations.zh-Hans: 你送货后把手推车收好。
translations.yue: 你送貨之後收好架手推車。
translations.pt: Você guarda o carrinho de carga depois da entrega.
translations.he: אתה מחזיר את עגלת המשא למקום אחרי המשלוח.
translations.vi: Bạn cất xe đẩy hàng sau khi giao hàng.
translations.ar: تضع عربة اليد في مكانها بعد التسليم.
translations.nl: Je zet de steekwagen weg na de levering.
translations.hu: A kiszállítás után elteszed a molnárkocsit.
translations.hi: डिलीवरी के बाद तुम हैंड ट्रॉली जगह पर रखते हो.
translations.el: Τακτοποιείς το καρότσι μετά την παράδοση.
translations.nb: Du setter sekketralleen på plass etter leveringen.
translations.id: Kamu menyimpan troli barang setelah pengantaran.
translations.sv: Du ställer undan säckkärran efter leveransen.
translations.ro: Pui căruciorul la loc după livrare.
translations.da: Du stiller sækkevognen på plads efter leveringen.
translations.ja: 配達の後で手押し台車を片付けます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of ranges.
Verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive predicate; takes direct object le diable.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of diable.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ranges; in this context typically the tool, though the word also means ‘devil’.
Preposition; introduces a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of livraison.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition après; denotes the event providing the time reference.
